positive: An intricate, geometric pattern featuring stylized golden sun rays radiating outwards from a central nexus, intertwined with delicate filigree vines and celestial spheres. The design should have a highly contrasting, minimalist silhouette suitable for deep navy blue or forest green apparel. Use Art Deco and Neo-Mythological influences. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, with clear black lines on a white background for maximum print contrast.
